text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and I continue to train hard for the tryouts. One day
after practice, I ask her if we can talk.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Okay, cooldown's done. So... whaddaya wanna talk about?
choice_data_list: Just a final piece of advice before tryouts.
Just a final piece of advice before tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Final? Whaddaya mean by that? Don't tell me... ya think I don't got
what it takes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I shake my head in disagreement and explain that she's got what it
takes to win. Which is why this is my final piece of advice as her
temporary trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what're ya talking about?! Dis isn't the time to be havin' fun! I
needa run for my life!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What're ya—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, Tamamo Cross has never been able to race to her full
potential, and I think I know why. I begin to tell her what I've noticed
after observing her...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! Huff! I gotta win dis! I gotta! I gotta win!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My folks worked hard to get me into this academy, so I gotta make it
worth the price! That's why I gotta win! But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's desire to win for her family is a strong one... Perhaps
too strong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead of serving as motivation, it's making her nervous. Once those
nerves get the better of her, she loses sight of her goal, and her
performance suffers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that isn't to say her love for her family is a bad thing. If anything,
it should be cherished. So I tell her...
choice_data_list: Introduce the rest of us to White Lightning.
Introduce the rest of us to White Lightning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can combine her love for her family and the joy she feels from
running, Tamamo Cross will have all she needs to win. At least, that's
my theory.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You've got a point. Dad only called me that when I was havin' fun,
but... shouldn't I be focused on winnin'? Is that really the time to play
'round?
choice_data_list: Who says you can't do both?
Who says you can't do both?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Seriously, since when am I so blind? When you say it like that,
it's preeetty obvious, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's never been my body holdin' me back—it's my mind. I've been
freakin' myself out 'bout winnin'. No wonder I'm slowin' down.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But that's not the real me. And that's not White Lightning!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Uraaagh! Whaddaya think of dis?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Siblings
text_block_list.text: Cooool!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
I swear, Tama, I'll never get sick of dat smile on your face when you're
runnin'! Go, White Lightning, the fastest in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for that last tip, and consider it done. Hope you're lookin'
forward to the tryouts! 'Cause, well... I sure will be!
choice_data_list: That's what I wanted to hear!
That's what I wanted to hear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the day of the tryouts arrives.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The racers are approaching the last corner before the final stretch!
The racers in the back are making moves, but is it too late?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(The wind whizzin' past my ears, the earth beneath my feet... the
crazy thump-thump in my heart! Gotta say... been a hot minute since I
felt like this!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: (Guess I really was in my head, huh? I even forgot how good runnin' feels!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(Now I'm itchin' to let loose! These legs could outrun anything right
now! Better keep your eyes peeled, 'cause I'ma blow you away!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Urrraaaauuugh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross is picking up speed and gaining ground! She's flying past the competition!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross takes the lead and... That's it! With that terrific dash,
Tamamo Cross rushes in to claim first place!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah! Now DAT'S what I'm talkin' about! Dat was White Lightning,
aka... TAMAMO CROSS!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Her pacing was much steadier this time around. Maybe I
misjudged her...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That tremendous sprint at the end... I thought her small frame would
hold her back, but I guess not.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes, YES! Didja see dat?! I blew 'em all away!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah! But you know, you're the real star of the show. Seriously, I
couldn't have done this without ya!
choice_data_list: Well, you're the one who ran the race.
Well, you're the one who ran the race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You know... with the tryouts done, your trial period's technically over.
You're free to scout and train whoever ya want.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But... well, unless you've got a certain racer in mind—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
—I'd like to—OH, COME ON! I'm talkin' here! I swear, ya need a
serious lesson in manners. Seriously, lemme finish for once...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Tone it down, will ya?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Pfft! Ahahaha! Baaaahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
For cryin' out loud, I feel so dumb. I was so nervous, but here ya are,
giddy as hell! I swear.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But well, I'm glad you're on board! Put 'er there, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I firmly grasp Tamamo Cross's hand and give it a vigorous shake. From
now on, we're working as a team!
